title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a clean CLI and REST API for pulling and running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and async wrapper for the Ollama HTTP API; installable via PyPI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, and tool callers inside LangChain.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Popular open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama backends; Docker one-liner deployment.

title: ollama-cli (sugarforever/ollama-cli)
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot (github-copilot-like)
summary: Experimental VS-Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-helm (ollama-helm/ollama-helm)
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama (Maven Central: ollama4j) with Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-nuxt-chat
summary: Full-stack Nuxt 3 chat app that proxies Ollama API with SSR and Tailwind UI.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that routes user prompts to your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module to spin up Ollama service and run model tests inside pipelines.

title: ollama-gpt-script
summary: GPTScript tools provider that exposes Ollama models as callable tools for agent flows.

title: ollama-rs (rust client)
summary: Community Rust crate (crates.io: ollama-rs) offering strongly-typed async client for Ollama.

title: ollama-csharp (ollama-csharp/ollama-csharp)
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama (NuGet: OllamaSharp) supporting chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-streamlit-chat
summary: Streamlit chat UI that talks to Ollama back-end with session memory and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-obsidian-plugin
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai)
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that answers slash commands by querying a local Ollama server.
